uncertainties.read: Field-split trust sheet. Present block = AMOUNT OF INCOME (Block D, wide transposed Min/Max matrix: None / $1-$200 / $201-$1,000 / $1,001-$2,500 / $2,501-$5,000 / $5,001-$15,000 / $15,001-$50,000 / $50,001-$100,000 / $100,001-$1,000,000 / $1,000,001-$5,000,000 / Over $5,000,000 / Spouse-DC income over $1,000,000) PLUS a far-right TRANSACTION SUMMARY block (columns P / S / S(part)). Value and Type-of-Income blocks are on separate sheets (p.106 = Value, p.107 = Type of Income) and are null here; merge downstream by asset name. Asset slice = 'Ritu Ahuja Declaration of Trust', same 27 assets and same order as p.106/p.107.
uncertainties.note: amount_of_income and transaction nulled per SPEC allowance: this scan is severely degraded and both grids are tight (amount columns ~50px apart; 27 rows drift vertically), so exact per-row column assignment is unresolvable without high error. Observed distributions for downstream re-read of quads/page-108-TR.jpg and page-108-BR.jpg: (a) Amount-of-Income marks cluster in the two lowest buckets ($1-$200 and $201-$1,000), with a few in $1,001-$2,500 / $2,501-$5,000; (b) the Transaction Summary block shows a scattering of S and S(part) marks (roughly a dozen rows carry a transaction) plus a few P marks, consistent with the trust actively trading these munis during the year - but per-row P/S/S(part) assignment is not resolvable here.
owner carried from the p.106/p.107 slice reading (left-margin code read as SP but degraded; could be DC). Systematic if wrong.
